title: Piquant Portuguese Orange Casserole
description: A citrusy, gooey dessert that blends the rich sweetness of black treacle with bright orange flavors, spiced with cinnamon, nutmeg, turmeric, and ginger for a Portuguese-inspired treat.

ingredients.name: oranges
ingredients.notes: tangerines preferred, use zest and juice

instructions: Preheat oven to 180C and line a 20x20 cm baking dish with parchment.
Zest one orange and squeeze juice from all four oranges into a bowl.
Whisk together eggs, coconut milk, melted butter, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, ginger, and turmeric until smooth.
Stir in black treacle, brown sugar, orange zest, and orange juice, mixing until well combined.
Pour mixture into prepared dish and spread evenly.
Bake for 35 minutes until the top is set and lightly browned.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before sprinkling toasted almonds on top.
Slice and serve warm, optionally with a dollop of Greek yogurt or a drizzle of honey.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the fridge for up to 3 days.
Reheat slices in a microwave for 30 to 45 seconds before serving.
